leadText: The Water Stone (Japanese: みずのいし Water Stone) is a type of Evolution stone introduced in Generation I.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Can be used to evolve one of several Pokémon. This consumes the Water Stone. Causes Poliwhirl to evolve into Poliwrath Causes Shellder to evolve into Cloyster Causes Staryu to evolve into Starmie Causes Eevee to evolve into Vaporeon The Water Stone cannot be used to evolve the Partner Eevee or Eevee with the Gigantamax Factor into Vaporeon. Causes Lombre to evolve into Ludicolo Causes Panpour to evolve into Simipour Other uses [ edit | edit source ] In Pokémon Crystal and HeartGold and SoulSilver , the player is required to have a Water Stone to open the hidden room in the southwestern chamber of the Ruins of Alph . In Pokémon Crystal, the player simply needs to have it in their Bag . In Pokémon HeartGold and SoulSilver, they need to use it while facing the wall.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Can be used to evolve one of several Pokémon by offering it at the Luminous Cave R B or Luminous Spring T D S or by using it in a dungeon GtI . This consumes the Water Stone. Causes Poliwhirl to evolve into Poliwrath Causes Shellder to evolve into Cloyster Causes Staryu to evolve into Starmie Causes Eevee to evolve into Vaporeon Causes Lombre to evolve into Ludicolo Causes Panpour to evolve into Simipour If thrown, it will deal 1 R B T D S /2 GtI damage (2 if sticky ). In Red Rescue Team, Blue Rescue Team, Explorers of Time, Explorers of Darkness, and Explorers of Sky, using this item in a dungeon will consume it, with no effect.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Water Stone is required to evolve certain Pokémon in Pokémon Sleep. It is consumed upon use. Eevee requires 80 Eevee Candy and a Water Stone to evolve into Vaporeon .
